## Summary

<!-- Briefly describe what this PR does and why -->

## Type of Change

- [ ] New agent or skill
- [ ] Enhancement to existing agent/skill
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Build / CI / tooling
- [ ] Refactor (no behavior change)

## Testing

<!-- Describe what you tested and how -->

- [ ] Ran `bun run validate` successfully
- [ ] Ran `bun run build` successfully
- [ ] Tested with target platform(s): Copilot / OpenCode / Claude Code

## Checklist

- [ ] Follows [conventional commit](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) format
- [ ] Agent frontmatter uses model tiers (`high` / `medium` / `low`), not specific model names
- [ ] No secrets or credentials included
- [ ] Updated relevant documentation (if applicable)
